title: HUNT-852 I, the most hated person in school, happened to be in close contact with Madonna in the class on a crowded train! Though I thought it was bad, my lower body reacted and the worst thing was that my erection was stuck in Madonna's crotch! But when I was struggling because I couldn't do anything about it, Madonna's appearance suddenly changed! And ... no way ...
overview: An overcrowded train that can't move at all. In such a situation of Gyukyu, a super popular girl who can be said to be Madonna of the class is in front of me! And the occupancy rate goes up, and finally it reaches zero distance where the body is in close contact! Naturally, my sensitive crotch reacts to the situation and erections! And that Ichimotsu hits Madonna's Ma Ko directly! Then Madonna is in estrus!
